roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S REPLY TO SFPD'S OPPOS TO MOT RETURN OF PROP FILED
SFPD LEGAL'S OPPOS TO DEFT'S MOT FOR RETURN OF PROP FILED
DEFT'S MOT FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY FILED

/CAL: DEF MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X: RONNIE WAGNER, WITH THE S,F,P,D, LEGAL DEPT,, IS PRESENT IN COURT,/X: THE RETURN OF THE MONEY WAS RESOLVED INFORMALLLY BY STIPULATION OF COUNSEL WITH NO OPPOSITION BY THE DISTRICTATTORNEY,/X: THE ISSUE REGARDING RETURN OF THE MARIJUANA IS ARGUED AND SUBMITTED,/MO GRTD/X: THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO THE MARIJUANA,/CTORD: THEMARIJUANA RETURNED TO THE MOVING PARTY/X: AN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED INOPEN COURT,/X: AN ORDER FOR DESTRUCTION OF SEIZED  ECSTASY  IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT,/
